About.title: Official Distributor
About.desc: Mega Adhitama Sejati is a trusted partner in providing quality building materials for the retail segment, with a primary service area in Banten Province. We offer a range of other superior products.

Features.desc_features: Distributor of quality building materials with guaranteed quality

products.title: Quality & Trusted Products
products.desc: Providing building materials from trusted brands with high quality standards and strict quality control.

warehouse.title: Strategic Warehouse & Guaranteed Stock
warehouse.desc: Supported by strategic warehouse locations to facilitate the distribution process and an integrated management system that ensures optimal and sustainable stock availability.

experience.title: Experienced Since 2012
experience.desc: More than a decade of experience is the basis of trust and consistent service in the building materials industry.

team.title: Professional & Experienced Team
team.desc: Supported by trained employees who understand the products and project needs, enabling them to provide fast, precise, and solution-oriented service.

delivery.title: Fast & On-Time Delivery
delivery.desc: Supported by a reliable fleet and logistics system to ensure fast delivery according to project schedules.

Product.desc_product: Find high quality Building Materials products for your project needs.
Product.icon_1_desc: High-quality construction materials to support strong, precise, and sustainable construction.
Product.icon_2_desc: Modern sanitary solutions with trusted quality for residential, commercial, and industrial needs.
Product.icon_3_desc: Professional safety equipment to support industrial project and operational safety standards.
Product.sub-desc-product: Construction material, sanitary, and safety equipment solutions to support modern projects that are efficient, safe, and high quality.

Testimoni.desc_testimoni: Our customers who have experienced MAS's service

companyprofile.desc_company: PT. Mega Adhitama Sejati was founded in 2012, with its first product marketed being Semen Merah Putih, distributed in the Banten region.
companyprofile.desc_office: Our office is located in Puri Kencana, West Jakarta, and we have a representative office in downtown Serang, Banten. We also have a SERVVO fire extinguisher showroom in Serang, Banten.
companyprofile.desc_warehouse: In running its business, PT. Mega Adhitama Sejati is committed to providing the best service and delivery for customers. Currently we have 2 (two) large warehouse locations located in Alam Sutera-Tangerang & Rangkasbitung-Banten.

vision.desc_vision: To become the best and most trusted building materials distribution company in Banten, with quality products at competitive prices, and services oriented towards customer satisfaction.
vision.desc_mission_1: Providing a variety of high-quality building materials at competitive prices to meet diverse market needs.
vision.desc_mission_2: Continuously innovating and developing various efficient and effective sales and distribution methods to increase competitiveness and customer satisfaction.
vision.desc_mission_3: Providing professional, responsive, and friendly customer service, and ensuring product availability with fast and timely delivery, to achieve customer satisfaction and trust.
vision.desc_mission_4: Synergizing the interests of shareholders and stakeholders for the advancement of the company and the common good.
vision.desc_mission_5: Providing continuous training and development for employees to improve competence and professionalism, as well as building reliable, honest, and high-quality human resources.

achievement.desc_achievement: Mega Adhitama Sejati has received various awards for its commitment to implementing sustainability principles in its business operations. These awards reflect the Company's efforts to create a positive impact on the environment, society, and responsible governance.

rudy_descriptions: Born in Jakarta and earned a Bachelor of Economics and Accounting degree from Atma Jaya Catholic University in 1993.
Since elementary school, he has been involved in the family business as a retailer, which formed the foundation of his understanding of the business world.

In 1991, while still in college, he began working as a professional tax consultant and from 1992 to 2013 worked in accounting and finance. These experiences were invaluable in building his future business. In 2003, he started his own retail business and successfully developed it.

Five years later, he founded PT Intisukses Mitra Sejati, his first company, which became the foundation for further business expansion. In 2012, he founded a second company engaged in cement distribution in collaboration with business partners. Since then, he has continued to innovate and establish several other companies in various business sectors. With his experience and strong vision, he is committed to continuously developing a sustainable business and making a positive contribution to his stakeholders.
mega_descriptions: Born in Serang and earned a Bachelor of Economics and Accounting degree from Atma Jaya Catholic University in 1993. He spent his childhood and completed his junior high school education in Serang, before continuing his high school education in Jakarta in 1985 and then went on to college.
Starting in 1992, while in college, he worked as a professional in finance for a food company. From 1994 to 2001, he worked in finance for a developer building apartments, hotels, and offices.

His entrepreneurial spirit began to be honed in 2003 when he started a business as a retailer. In 2008, he founded his first company, PT Intisukses Mitra Sejati, which became the forerunner for various subsequent companies.
With extensive experience and high dedication, he will continue to lead and develop businesses that have a positive impact in various industrial sectors.
suryo_descriptions: Born in Serang and earned a Bachelor of Economics and Accounting degree from Atma Jaya Catholic University in 1993. He spent his childhood and completed his junior high school education in Serang, before continuing his high school education in Jakarta in 1985 and then went on to college.
Starting in 1992, while in college, he worked as a professional in finance for a food company. From 1994 to 2001, he worked in finance for a developer building apartments, hotels, and offices.

His entrepreneurial spirit began to be honed in 2003 when he started a business as a retailer. In 2008, he founded his first company, PT Intisukses Mitra Sejati, which became the forerunner for various subsequent companies.
With extensive experience and high dedication, he will continue to lead and develop businesses that have a positive impact in various industrial sectors.

Products.desc_products: Find the product that suits your needs, with a variety of the best products.
Products.servvo_features_1: Fully Certified and Meets National Standards
Products.servvo_features_3: Product Innovations to Meet Today's Needs
Products.servvo_desc: SERVVO is a portable fire extinguisher (APAR) and fire detection system that prioritizes quality and high performance, is environmentally friendly, and is nationally and internationally certified. It is supported by reliable and experienced experts. It is a pioneer in fire extinguishers and has achieved SNI 180-1:2022, the Quality Requirements for Portable Fire Extinguishers (APAP).
Products.semenmerahputih_desc: Semen Merah Putih uses selected raw materials supported by state-of-the-art production equipment and skilled labor to produce higher strength. It contains pozzolanic materials that provide longer-lasting building durability, including against environments containing salt and sulfate. It has unique grain characteristics that simplify the cement mixing process and produce a smoother plaster surface that is less prone to cracking.
Products.wavin_desc: Wavin provides effective solutions for everyday life needs, from pressurized pipe systems for clean water and wastewater, hot and cold water piping systems suitable for sanitation and drinking water applications, low-noise drainage pipes, and smart solutions for rainwater.
Products.trilliunhose_desc: Trilliun Hose is a hose made of pure PVC, strong and durable. Designed to be flexible and easy to use in a variety of situations, Trilliun Hose is a well-known hose product on the market for household, agricultural, and industrial use.
Products.trilliunware_features_3: Seat Cover Durability Up to 100,000 Times
Products.trilliunware_features_4: Tank Trim Durability Up to 100,000 Times
Products.trilliunware_desc: Trilliunware is a premium sanitary product line that includes a variety of bathroom fixtures such as faucets, showers, sinks, toilets, squat toilets, and urinals, all equipped with exclusive spare parts and accessories. Trilliunware is designed with quality, durability, and aesthetic design in mind to enhance comfort and hygiene in daily use.
Products.tokka_features_1: Sharp nail heads that don't bend easily.
Products.tokka_features_2: Nails are more rust-resistant, less likely to break, and have a glossier finish due to the polishing process.
Products.tokka_features_3: Flat nail heads for easier impact.
Products.tokka_desc: Tokka is a nail made of high quality materials.
Products.dulux_desc: Dulux is a wall paint formulated with Chroma-Brite technology that produces brighter and longer-lasting colors.
Products.superex_desc: Superex is an aluminum and stainless steel product line with flagship brands including Royal Sink, Tangga Fortuna, and Tirta Max. Superex products are made from AISI Nickel Chrome stainless steel and have a simple design for easy installation.
Products.yoshino_desc: Yoshino Gypsum is a gypsum board brand from Japan. Yoshino Gypsum creates high-performance wall partition systems. It contains a mildew inhibitor to inhibit mold growth, is strong in rooms with high humidity, and is Green Label certified.
Products.aquaproof_features_4: Easy to apply and strong adhesion
Products.aquaproof_desc: Aquaproof is a type of leak-proof coating typically used to protect surfaces from leaks and water seepage. Furthermore, this paint is resistant to mold and mildew, helping to maintain the cleanliness and beauty of the coated surface.
Products.bildo_features_1: Stronger and less prone to breaking
Products.bildo_features_2: More competitively priced, resulting in greater savings
Products.bildo_desc: Asbestos Bildo is an asbestos roofing product made from quality materials.
Products.dcota_features_1: Leak-proof and leak-proof, saving water consumption.
Products.dcota_features_2: Made of high-quality materials that have been tested to be strong, rust-resistant, and environmentally friendly.
Products.dcota_features_3: Ensures product quality by providing a 3-5 year product warranty.
Products.dcota_desc: Dcota is a sanitary product made from high-quality materials and finished with the finest chrome. Dcota products include hand showers, jet showers, sink faucets, wall faucets, valves, and kitchen faucets.
Products.slg_desc: SLG pipes are water pipes and fittings made from uPVC polymer, a thermoplastic material that is corrosion-resistant, water-insoluble, strong, easy to connect, and flexible.
Products.supreme_features_3: Complies with national and international standards.
Products.supreme_desc: Supreme cables are high-quality products made from pure copper with durable PVC or XLPE insulation. These products include a wide range of electrical, data, and telecommunication cables, as well as instrument and control cables designed for reliability and efficiency in a variety of applications.

Faq.faq_question_1: What is PT Mega Adhitama Sejati?
Faq.faq_question_2: How do I become a partner of PT Mega Adhitama Sejati?
Faq.faq_question_3: What products does PT Mega Adhitama Sejati distribute?
Faq.faq_question_4: What is the minimum order to become a partner?
Faq.faq_question_5: How do I contact PT Mega Adhitama Sejati customer service?
Faq.faq_answer_1: PT. Mega Adhitama Sejati was founded in 2012, with its first product marketed being Semen Merah Putih for distribution in the Banten region.
Faq.faq_answer_2: You can contact our marketing team through the Contact page or visit our operational office. Our team will guide you through the partnership registration process.
Faq.faq_answer_3: MAS distributes various building materials including product brands Servvo, Dulux, Semen Merah Putih, Tokka, Wavin, Yoshino Gypsum, Supreme, TrilliunHhose, Trilliunware, and other building accessories from over 14 leading brands.
Faq.faq_answer_4: Minimum orders vary depending on the product type and partnership program selected. Please contact our sales team for a quote tailored to your business needs.
Faq.faq_answer_5: You can contact us via WhatsApp, email, or phone, available on the Contact page. Our customer service team is ready to assist you on weekdays from 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM WIB.

santunan_2023_content_1: PT. Mega Adhitama Sejati once again held an orphanage donation program as a form of corporate social responsibility and concern for the community. This activity demonstrates the company's commitment to supporting orphans in need.

This donation program includes providing basic necessities, school supplies, and cash assistance to help ease the burden on beneficiary families. In addition to material assistance, this activity also served as an opportunity to share happiness and motivate the children to continue their enthusiasm for learning.

This activity was warmly received by the beneficiaries and is expected to provide lasting benefits to their lives. PT. Mega Adhitama Sejati is committed to continuing its social programs as a positive contribution to society.
Roominformation.shadaqah_2023_description: MAS Charity Program for building materials in the form of cement, paint, etc. for the construction of mosques
shadaqah_2023_content_1: The MAS Bersodaqoh program is to provide assistance with building materials in the mosque construction process, so that it can help expedite the implementation of construction and ease the burden on the committee and the local community.

This program is also a form of MAS's concern and social responsibility in supporting religious activities, strengthening brotherhood, and fostering a spirit of sharing and mutual cooperation in order to create a suitable and beneficial place of worship for the community.
Roominformation.buka_bersama_2023_description: Breaking the fast together with MAS to foster friendship and promote the “Mau Cash” Program
buka_bersama_2023_content_1: PT Mega Adhitama Sejati, part of the Reddmas group, successfully held a joint iftar event titled “Mau Cash” in 2023. This strategic event was implemented through close collaboration with Semen Merah Putih and the Mau Cash financial services company. This synergy between agencies demonstrates a strong commitment to building an inclusive and supportive business ecosystem for all stakeholders.

The main focus of this event was to strengthen ties and strengthen partnerships with MAS Store Partners. Amidst the solemn atmosphere of the holy month of Ramadan, this activity served as an effective platform for the company to share shared values. With closer communication, it is hoped that a solid relationship can be created that goes beyond mere transactional relationships.

In closing, this initiative is designed to create sustainable and mutually beneficial business collaborations. By strengthening this synergy, PT Mega Adhitama Sejati, along with its strategic partners, is committed to continuing to support business growth and achieving mutual success in the future.
Roominformation.annual_gathering_2023_description: Annual Gathering Bromo 2023 MAS and Reddmasgroup
Roominformation.annual_gathering_2023_content_1: The Reddmas Group Annual Gathering 2023 aims to foster togetherness, foster a sense of camaraderie, and strengthen synergy between units and individuals. This activity is expected to foster better communication, foster positive work ethic, and motivate employees to contribute maximally to achieving the company's goals and growth.
Roominformation.door_prize_2024_description: Doorprize for handing over a car to the winner of the SAKSES lottery
Roominformation.door_prize_2024_content_1: The SAKSES program organized by Semen Merah Putih aims to be a form of appreciation and reward for participants who have participated and shown loyalty and trust in the SAKSES program. This program is expected to provide motivation, increase enthusiasm, and strengthen good relations between organizers and participants. In addition, the awarding of the main prize in the form of a car is also a form of the organizer's commitment to presenting a lottery program that is transparent, credible, and provides real benefits for its participants.
Roominformation.qurban_2024_description: Distribute sacrificial animals to mosques and orphanages in 2024
Roominformation.qurban_2024_content_1: The MAS Berqurban program aims to foster social awareness and strengthen a sense of togetherness and solidarity with the surrounding community. Through this program, MAS is committed to sharing the joy of Eid al-Adha by distributing sacrificial animals to those in need, so that the benefits can be felt directly and evenly. In addition, this program also serves as a form of corporate social responsibility in supporting the values ​​of humanity, togetherness, and blessings for all parties.
Roominformation.qurban_2025_description: Distribute sacrificial animals to mosques and orphanages in 2025
Roominformation.qurban_2025_content_1: The MAS Berqurban program aims to foster social awareness and strengthen a sense of togetherness and solidarity with the surrounding community. Through this program, MAS is committed to sharing the joy of Eid al-Adha by distributing sacrificial animals to those in need, so that the benefits can be felt directly and evenly. In addition, this program also serves as a form of corporate social responsibility in supporting the values ​​of humanity, togetherness, and blessings for all parties.
gathering_semen_1_content_1: Semen Merah Putih successfully held a lively Retail Gathering event on Thursday, April 10, 2025. Held at the Aston Hotel, the event was attended by top retail partners from various regions as a token of appreciation for their contributions to supporting the growth and distribution of Semen Merah Putih in the national market. With the theme “Building the Nation Together”, this event served as a crucial opportunity to maintain the partnership between Semen Merah Putih and its retail partners and strengthen synergy to face market challenges in 2025 and beyond.

The event began with a warm welcome from the management of PT Cemindo Gemilang Tbk, followed by a session explaining the latest business strategies, sales achievements, and plans for more effective and sustainable distribution development. One of the most anticipated moments was the awards session for high-achieving retail partners, a token of appreciation for their commitment and contribution to maintaining the quality of Semen Merah Putih's distribution to the end consumer. Furthermore, the atmosphere was further enlivened by entertainment, attractive door prizes, and networking sessions that allowed all participants to exchange experiences and ideas.

“We believe that Semen Merah Putih's success is inseparable from the power of synergy. With our retail partners. Through this gathering, we want to maintain trust, improve communication, and create mutually beneficial collaborations,” said Wildan. With a spirit of togetherness, the 2025 Semen Merah Putih Retail Gathering is expected to spark new enthusiasm in building closer and more productive collaborations in the future.
gathering_wavin_1_content_1: Strengthening its position in the infrastructure market, PT Wavin Trading Indonesia collaborated with PT Mega Adhitama Sejati to hold the 2025 Wavin Retailer Gathering with the theme “ Together Flowing the Country ”.
The event, attended by dozens of retail partners, aimed to accelerate product penetration and introduce the latest water management solutions in Banten Province.

Wavin representatives emphasized that Banten is a strategic region with significant construction potential, while PT Mega Adhitama Sejati is optimistic that this collaboration will create a more solid and sustainable business ecosystem, Through this event, Wavin is committed to providing full support to its partners through product education and intensive promotional programs to support the development of quality water infrastructure throughout Indonesia.

Career.karir_desc: With more than 14 business brands and 1,100 retail spread across Jabodetabek, we offer a variety of challenging positions for professionals, fresh graduates, and internship opportunities.
